toolsNeeded: Aviation maps, approach plates, jeppesen charts, simulators
marketingMethods: Direct outreach to flying clubs and pilot training academies
growthPotential: Building an integrated pilot training academy with flight simulators.

name: Swimming Coaching Academy (Rural)
description: Government-tied water safety and swimming program running in rural school ponds/tanks.
toolsNeeded: Floating rescue ropes, safety kits, kickboards
marketingMethods: Gram Panchayat water safety grant programs
whereToStart: Rural irrigation canals or school ponds (with permission)
growthPotential: Running 50-village program with state government funding.

name: Teacher Training Institute (B.Ed / D.Ed)
description: Running a private teacher education college imparting B.Ed or D.El.Ed degrees approved by NCTE.
toolsNeeded: College infrastructure, library, computer lab
marketingMethods: Aggressive counseling at 12th result time
growthPotential: Building a full multi-programme private deemed university.

name: Chess Coaching Academy
description: Training children and adults in chess from beginner to tournament-level play.
toolsNeeded: Chess boards, clock timers, Chess.com or Lichess premium accounts
marketingMethods: School chess club partnerships and online tournaments
growthPotential: Producing national-level tournament winners, massive PR for your academy.

name: AI / Machine Learning Bootcamp
description: An intensive 3-6 month program teaching Python, ML, Deep Learning, and LLM fine-tuning to engineers.
requiredSkills: Industry ML experience + ability to simplify complex math
toolsNeeded: Cloud GPU credits (AWS/GCP), Jupyter notebooks, projector
marketingMethods: 'Job Placement within 90 days or full refund' guarantee
growthPotential: Building India's top AI coding school competing with Scaler or Newton School.

name: Sports Academic Scholarship Coaching
description: Coaching school students to achieve state/national sports rankings to qualify for sports quota admissions.
toolsNeeded: Sport-specific equipment
marketingMethods: Targeting parents who want their child to get a sports-quota engineering college seat
growthPotential: Building a residential sports academy (like a mini Pullela Gopichand Academy).

name: Animation & VFX Training School
description: Teaching 3D animation (Maya/Blender), compositing (Nuke), and VFX for Bollywood and gaming.
toolsNeeded: High-spec workstations with NVIDIA RTX cards, render farm
marketingMethods: Creating a demo reel of student showreels to attract admissions
growthPotential: Running your own VFX production house.

name: Islamic / Vedic Scriptures Studies Centre
description: Running a madrassa, gurukulam, or religious study centre teaching classical texts, theology, and Sanskrit.
requiredSkills: Mastery of the relevant scripture and classical language
toolsNeeded: Reading materials, quiet study halls
marketingMethods: Community trust and word of mouth within the religious community
growthPotential: Building a national residential gurukul with government heritage funding.

name: Origami & Paper Craft Workshop
description: Conducting afterschool workshops teaching Japanese origami, quilling, decoupage, and paper art.
requiredSkills: Advanced origami and paper crafting skills
toolsNeeded: Art paper kits, scissors, craft boards
marketingMethods: School and society activity-day workshops
growthPotential: Building a premium Japanese art school brand.

name: Government Exam Question Bank Publisher
description: Compiling, designing, and selling subject-wise previous-year question banks for MPSC, Police, Teacher exams.
toolsNeeded: Commercial printer, Content Management System
marketingMethods: Distributing through all book retailers in the state + Amazon
growthPotential: Building state-wide dominant exam guide brand like Navneet or STD.

name: Social Media Content Creator School
description: Teaching aspiring creators how to grow on Instagram, YouTube, and build personal brands monetizing content.
requiredSkills: Personal creator track record (100K+ followers minimum for credibility)
toolsNeeded: Laptop, high quality camera, online course platform
marketingMethods: Your existing followers become your first paying students
growthPotential: Building India's largest creator incubator / influencer school.

name: Medical Entrance (NEET) Coaching
description: Specialized institute coaching students for NEET-UG (MBBS/BDS) and NEET-PG (Medical Post-Graduation).
requiredSkills: NEET high score + deep biology/chemistry knowledge
toolsNeeded: Classrooms, well-stocked library, online test software
marketingMethods: Displaying Selection Ranks of your students on hoardings and social media
whereToStart: Medical exam coaching hub like Kota model
growthPotential: Pan-India franchise of NEET coaching with 1000+ yearly admissions.

name: Mobile App & Flutter Development Training
description: Teaching cross-platform app development with Flutter/React Native, Firebase backend and app publishing.
requiredSkills: Published apps on Play Store + App Store; 3+ years Flutter experience
toolsNeeded: Laptops, Android test devices
marketingMethods: Publishing free Flutter projects on GitHub and YouTube tutorials
growthPotential: Building a tech-incubator grooming student app startups.

name: GD-PI (MBA Interview) Coaching
description: Preparing MBA students specifically for Group Discussions and Personal Interviews at IIM/FMS/XLRI.
eligibility: IIM or top B-school alumni preferred
toolsNeeded: None (A boardroom-like room with a table and 6 chairs)
marketingMethods: IIM alumnus tag is a self-marketing superpower on LinkedIn
whereToStart: Your own conference-style space or Zoom
growthPotential: Building the definitive MBA admission counseling brand in India.

name: Skill India / PMKVY Training Center
description: Becoming an empanelled NSDC training partner to deliver Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY) courses to youth for free, funded by the government.
manpowerRequired: Centre head + 2-3 Sector Skill Council trainers
toolsNeeded: Biometric attendance systems, trade-specific lab setup
marketingMethods: Enrolling un-employed youth from village panchayats via camps
whereToStart: Semi-urban areas with high youth unemployment
growthPotential: Scaling to 10+ centers across a state, training 5000+ youth annually.
